meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no version control (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve No Version Control
content.seo_description: Learn to implement user onboarding to mitigate version control issues. An intermediate guide for students using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Without version control, you risk losing progress during iterative development. Implement structured user onboarding as a safeguard: it forces modular code design, creates clear state checkpoints, and ensures your application remains functional even if your main codebase becomes unstable. This approach stabilizes your architecture while you master advanced deployment workflows.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks coding your first SaaS, but one wrong command has wiped your progress. Without version control, your project is a house of cards, and you are one 'delete' away from total failure. The panic is real, and the lessons learned in the wreckage are harsh, but there is a path forward.

By treating your user onboarding flow as a rigorous, modular checkpoint system, you can effectively bypass the chaos of manual file management. This guide transforms your development process, forcing you to build in distinct, recoverable stages. We’ll use Antigravity and Claude Code to turn your onboarding sequence into a robust foundation that protects your work and impresses future employers.

steps.title: Define State Checkpoints
steps.description: Establish clear onboarding milestones that act as logical 'save states' for your application logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a state management schema that breaks the user onboarding flow into four distinct, independent modules to ensure code modularity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Initialize state-machine architecture for user onboarding module'

steps.title: Implement Modular Routing
steps.description: Isolate onboarding components so that a crash in one does not compromise the entire application state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the onboarding flow into isolated component files to allow for individual testing and safe iterative development.

steps.title: Automate Data Persistence
steps.description: Ensure user progress is saved at every onboarding step, preventing data loss during manual testing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a persistence layer that saves onboarding progress to local storage after every user interaction.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --file src/onboarding/persistence.ts --logic 'autosave on step completion'

steps.title: Build Recovery Hooks
steps.description: Create logic that detects failed states and gracefully restores the user to the last valid onboarding step.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a recovery hook that checks for corrupted state and resets the onboarding flow to the last verified checkpoint.

steps.title: Validate Integrity
steps.description: Run automated checks to ensure the onboarding flow remains functional across all modular updates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of integration tests that verify the onboarding flow remains intact despite changes to the core application logic.

pro_tips: Treat your onboarding flow as a state machine; it makes debugging infinitely easier than using nested if-else statements.
Always comment your code with 'Why' rather than 'What' to ensure you understand your logic when you return to the project weeks later.
Use mock data services during the onboarding build phase to avoid hitting rate limits while you iterate on your UI.
Document your onboarding logic in a README.md file; it serves as a 'manual version control' by tracking your architectural decisions.
Build a 'Reset' button into your onboarding dev-mode to instantly clear state without needing to manually refresh or clear browser caches.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding is modular and stable, begin integrating your first API service to transition from a static project to a dynamic, production-ready SaaS application.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting code instability hold your career back. Start building with confidence and professional-grade workflows today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
